name: Drive Shack
about: Drive Shack Raleigh combines a high-tech golf driving range with interactive games and an upscale sports bar atmosphere. The venue features climate-controlled bays and a rooftop terrace, positioned conveniently 15 minutes from downtown Raleigh and 25 minutes from Durham. It offers a full menu of chef-inspired dishes and craft drinks, making it suitable for both casual play and social gatherings. Pricing varies by day and time, starting at $25 per bay hour during off-peak hours and increasing to $55 during weekend evenings and special events.
why_golfers_like_it: Full service all-weather bays ensure playability in any condition
Interactive games and golf courses provide entertainment beyond traditional practice
Upscale sports bar atmosphere with multiple lounge areas and a rooftop terrace
TrackMan technology for accurate shot tracking and simulation

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu of chef-inspired dishes available
Craft drinks available at the full-service bar

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor technology used for simulation and tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site, though players are welcome to bring their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers a full menu and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes simulation time varies depending on player pace and bay occupancy, typically ranging from 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Drive Shack features Puttery, a mini-golf area designed for families and players of all ages.
